card_eligibility.source_phrase: Individuals who live, work or study in Massachusetts are eligible to hold a Minuteman Library Network card, which avails patrons of over six million items held by forty-two member libraries.
card_eligibility.source_block: Individuals who live, work or study in Massachusetts are eligible to hold a Minuteman Library Network card, which avails patrons of over six million items held by forty-two member libraries. A valid Minuteman library card allows borrowing privileges at all member libraries, though select resources and databases may be only available based on residency or college affiliation.
